titleStmt.title: SII 23.44: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 44. (A.R. No. 44 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Rājarāja I: year 26: 1010-11 A.D.

summary.p: This refers to the quarter vēli of land previously set apart by the temple authorities for offerings to god Pichchadēvar in the temple, and records an addition of a mā and half of land and ten kāśu besides, obtained as gift for providing for offerings and for burning a lamp during three services to the god instead of the old two. The transactions of the temple, it may be noted, are said to be carried on by Chaṇḍēśvara acting as agent on behalf of the god. Reference is made to the revenue survey by which probably the addition of the land was possible.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpola perunilacelviyum
taṉakke Urimaipūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālaik kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampāṭiyu
m taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapā
ṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟk koṇṭa taṉ neḻil vaḷar Ūḻiuḷ Ellā yāṇṭum
toḻutakaiviḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiñarait tecukoḷ śrīkopirāja rājakesari panmarāna śrī rājarājadevarkku
yāṇṭu 26vatu vaṭakarai rājentrasiṅhavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu devadāṉa brahmedeyam Avaṉi nārāyaṇacatu
rvedimaṅkalattu tiruvicalūr ruṭaiyār koyiliṉ teṉpakkattu Eḻun=taruḷiniṟkum piccadevarkku śrīdaṇḍeśvaradevare Ippiccadevarkku
tiruamitukku koṇṭa nilam Orumāvaraiyum munpu kalveṭṭuppaṭi kāl ceyum Āka nilam paḻampaṭi Aṟumāvaraiyum Itiṉnāl U
lakaḷantun teṟina nilam muṉṟu can=tikkum tiruvamutum muṉṟusan=tikkum can=tiviḷakkum Idevarkke śiva
caṇḍeśvaradevarvaśaṅ kuṭutta kācu 10- ttu kācillum palicaicekuttu Ipiccadevarkku muṉṟu can=tikkum kaṟiya
y Amitum tayir(r)amitum Aṭaikkāyamitum Aṉṟu śrīkāryam ceyvāre Ikkācil palicai cekuttu Anṟu śrīkāryam ceyvā
re kuṟaivaṟukkakkaṭavar Idevare Iṟai Iṟuttu Inivan=tapaṭi cey vikkakaṭavār devakanmikaḷ Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai ..
svastīśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru tanṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ
Digital edition of SII 23.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
